query:
WITH input AS (
                SELECT
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY item_index, event_index) AS row_num,
                    resource_uid,
                    resource_kind,
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload,
                    item_index
                FROM UNNEST(
                    $1::uuid[],
                    $2::text[],
                    $3::timestamptz[],
                    $4::text[],
                    $5::jsonb[],
                    $6::bigint[],
                    $7::bigint[]
                ) AS e(
                    resource_uid,
                    resource_kind,
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload,
                    item_index,
                    event_index
                )
            ),
            inserted AS (
                INSERT INTO resource_events (
                    resource_uid,
                    resource_kind,
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload
                )
                SELECT
                    resource_uid,
                    resource_kind,
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload
                FROM input
                ORDER BY row_num
                RETURNING event_id
            ),
            numbered_inserted AS (
                SELECT
                    event_id,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY event_id) AS row_num
                FROM inserted
            )
            SELECT
                input.item_index as "item_index!",
                MAX(numbered_inserted.event_id) AS "event_id!"
            FROM input
            JOIN numbered_inserted USING (row_num)
            GROUP BY input.item_index
            ORDER BY input.item_index
